name: docgen
description: Docify — documentation automation SaaS (web app: React client + Node API + SQLite via Prisma)

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run db:push --prefix server && npm run seed --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
